No space left of device (mds) can be fixed by env changes. Something like below
------------------------------------------------------
Test-Parameters: mdssizegb=14 testlist=dom-performance
------------------------------------------------------

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

This patch was required to get https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/36386/ working. However on closer inspection it is understood that changing the env (mds size) which was getting 100% full making dom-performance(ior) to fail is sufficient. 

This patch is not required.

-1 until than. It will be abandoned soon.

Abandoned

Not required any more.

parents.subject: LU-15358 tests: Variable incorrectly defined under sanityn

commit.subject: LU-15405 tests: Imporove dom-performance IOR Test
commit.message:
LU-15405 tests: Imporove dom-performance IOR Test

This patch addresses two issue with present
test_IOR test under dom-performance.

1. IOR randomize access(-z) requires blocksize >
transferSize. This patch adjusts tsize accordingly

-----------IOR ERROR------------
ERROR: IOR will randomize access within a block
and repeats the same pattern for all segments,
therefore choose blocksize > transferSize, (ior.c:1485)
--------------------------------

2. Adjust iteration count of IOR to 1/4 as
higher count was making MDS run out of space

-----------IOR ERROR------------
ior ERROR: write() failed, errno 28,
No space left on device (aiori-POSIX.c:451)
--------------------------------

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=dom-performance
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I8fa23adadb245b25bca885c93ccf64c14b982679
